title: Implement Quick Search Shortcut
description: It would be great to have a Ctrl+K shortcut to quickly search across leads, tasks, and forms. This would save a lot of time navigating between sections.
adminReply: Great idea! We'll implement this in the next sprint.

title: Add Email Template Categories
description: Currently all email templates are in one list. Would be helpful to categorize them by use case - Onboarding, Follow-up, Proposal, etc.

title: Mobile App for Field Visits
description: A mobile app would be very useful for logging activities and submitting proof of work while on field visits. Currently have to wait until back in office.
